title: Text Input
description: Text Input is the default single-line field for names, titles, IDs, and short freeform values. It supports shared field labeling, helper and error text, validation, clear affordances, and multiple Fluent input variants.
intro: Text Input builds on the shared field foundation, so it inherits label positioning, helper and error messaging, validation hooks, disabled and readonly states, and accessible naming. Use it for short single-line values rather than long-form content.

featureSections.title: Basic field
featureSections.description: Start with a clear label, a useful placeholder only when it adds context, and short helper text when users benefit from format or expectation guidance.

featureSections.title: Input variants and sizes
featureSections.description: Use visual variants to match the surrounding surface and density. The field should stay readable and calm rather than trying to stand out on its own.

featureSections.title: Label positions and clear button
featureSections.description: The shared field wrapper supports labels above or inline around the control. Text Input also exposes a clear affordance when a value exists and the field is editable.

featureSections.title: States, required, and validation
featureSections.description: Reactive form with Save / Discard: required, email, minLength, optional pattern-style coupon, manual errorText with auto validation off, plus readonly/disabled benchmarks. Saving marks all touched so Angular messages surface together.

featureSections.title: Form composition
featureSections.description: Show text fields as part of a real form with helper text, validation, and related actions so users can copy an actual pattern instead of reconstructing one from fragments.

accessibility.title: Accessible name
accessibility.body:
The input uses `ariaLabel` when provided; otherwise it falls back to the visible `label`. If both are empty, no fallback name is invented, so visible labeling should remain the default pattern.

| Source | Accessible name |
| --- | --- |
| `ariaLabel` | explicit accessible name |
| visible `label` | default fallback |
| placeholder | not a label substitute |

accessibility.title: Keyboard
accessibility.body:
| Key | Action |
| --- | --- |
| `Tab` | moves focus to or from the field |
| standard text editing keys | handled by the native text input |
| `Escape` / `Enter` | no custom component behavior is added |

accessibility.title: Descriptions, errors, and validation
accessibility.body:
Helper text and error text are wired into `aria-describedby`. When an error is present, helper text is suppressed and the error message becomes the active description.

| State | Attribute |
| --- | --- |
| helper or error text | `aria-describedby` |
| visible error | `aria-invalid="true"` |
| required field | native `required` |

With `autoValidation`, Angular form control errors can populate the field message automatically.

apiSections.title: TextComponent - ui-text
apiSections.lead: Standalone single-line text field built on the shared FieldComponent. It integrates with Angular forms through ControlValueAccessor and inherits the shared field API for labeling, validation, and descriptive messaging.

blocks.title: Inherited field inputs
rows: Shared field surface token inherited from `FieldComponent`.
Controls where the field label is placed relative to the control.
Supporting helper text rendered below the field when there is no active error.
Validation or manual error message managed by the shared field base.
Disables the field and its interactive affordances.
Keeps the value visible while preventing user changes.
HTML form name used by the field wrapper and native control wiring.
Control id used to connect label, help text, and error messaging.
Inherited autocomplete hint for native form compatibility.
Inherited shared-field clear-button flag when supported by the concrete control.
Overrides the accessible name when no visible label is appropriate.
Appends extra descriptive ids to the computed `aria-describedby` value.
Enables inherited automatic validation error handling from `FieldComponent`.

blocks.title: Outputs
rows: Emitted when the text value changes from user input or a clear action.

paragraphs: The component implements ControlValueAccessor, so it works with ngModel, reactive forms, and Angular validators.
The clear button appears only when the field currently has a value and is neither disabled nor readonly.
blocks.title: Notes
Related mechanisms
items: FieldComponent - shared base handling labels, helper and error text, aria wiring, and validation synchronization.
